text:
drunkard I lazy:
If Moon, Rahu or Saturn are posited in 2nd to Mars or if
Moon + Rahu + Saturn are combined in 2nd or in 5* the husband
will be a good drinker. If Mars + Saturn + Moon combination is
present and Rahu is posited in 5'h to this combination, the would
be husband will have sufficient evil qualities in him.
Husband is a doctors
If Mars is combined with Saturn, Jupiter and Ketu the
husband will be a docter or if Mars is combined with Saturn,

44 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Venus and Kern the husband will have the profession of equivalent
to doctor.
Husband is from foreign land
If Mars is posited outside the Rahu- Kern axis, also if
Moon is posited in 2m to Mars the husband would be coming from
foreign land.
Husband is an anorv short tempered person
If Mars is combined with Rahu or if there is a combination
of Mars + Rahu + Ravi the native would be very short tempered
person. If the combination of Ravi + Jupiter + Mars + Rahu
